title: Not Quite Vanilla
description: A vanilla-ish modpack focused on utility, with a few sprinkles of content on top. Perfect for an SMP!
body:
![Not Quite Vanilla Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eeb4ae57ca8c4bbae94bdc68caa98428542c22a.png)
Not Quite Vanilla is a vanilla-ish modpack that expands the original game, with a focus on exploration, creativity and community.

This modpack comes with multiple server-related mods which makes it perfect for survival multiplayer servers (SMPs), but is also a blast to play on its own!

## Exploration
![A collage of: a stony river, a tent with campfire, the end, and a fishing structure on a rock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f508e8ec4e5b21c8be7164412ede08ae00dc8ba.jpeg)
Not Quite Vanilla comes with tons of vanilla+ style biomes, structures and even mobs! 
- Terralith, a datapack designed to fundamentally overhaul the overworld with new biomes and caves.
- Tectonic, a world generation project that aims to transform how terrain is shaped.
- BetterEnd, which new biomes into the End. Each biome has its own atmosphere, resources and mobs. 
- Fish of Thieves, a mod that adds all the fish from Sea of Thieves, fish fer ye pirate!

## Creativity
![A collage of: the exterior of a house, a painting in a forest, a painting in a decorated room, and a well-decorated room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebf9b2fa249b26841e2b1d629c7c18f1931d8e33.jpeg)
With tons of new blocks and features, you can let your creativity go wild!
- Joy of Painting, which lets you paint your own pictures and hang them on a wall like the vanilla paintings.
- Twigs, a mod all about building, adding new and interesting materials, as well as new renditions of vanilla blocks!
- Chipped, a block that adds over 9000 unique building blocks

## Community
![Showing off Pronouns and Emotes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61f4efb16571a7cdfce595b99c0b8113b6262859.jpeg)
